studioTagline: Original cinematic storytelling across books, trailers, comics, and future film.
studioDescription: Levy Media Studios is an independent media company creating original content across multiple formats.

bamn.title: BAMN Universe
bamn.shortDescription: A full story world expanding across books, trailers, comics, visuals, and future film content.
bamn.longDescription: BAMN Universe is the first major project from Levy Media Studios. It begins with a book and expands into trailers, comics, visuals, and future film or animated content.
